creator: bobson@egg.ics.nitch.ac.jp
text:
Addgroup command arrows 100 < GID < 65500.
	But, this command recievs GID 100.

How-To-Repeat: 
# ./addgroup -g 99 oops
Group id out of range 100 < 99 < 65500
usage: addgroup group [user]
       addgroup [-g gid] group [user[,user,...]]
# ./addgroup -g 100 oops      
#
